path: Problem: Reformat a date-time stored as text with one delimiter into another delimiter while preserving the original year and time components
Action: Use LEFT, MID, FIND, and concatenation to extract day/month/year substrings and append the time substring
Observation: When the source date-time is consistently structured (dd.mm.yy hh:mm), fixed-position substring extraction reliably rebuilds the desired format without global replace
